generation.image_prompt: Including exactly four golden pentacles. 1900s mystical lithography style. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. An anthropomorphic leopard cat in royal robes sits on a stone throne, clutching one pentacle to its chest, two under its feet, and one balanced on its head. Total of 4 pentacles. Background: a distant misty town. High-fidelity biological markers: narrow small-cat face, white ear spots, forehead stripes. No borders. Full bleed.
generation.narrative: The Four of Pentacles is 'The Territory Guard'—the impulse to fiercely protect and hold onto a secure core habitat, preventing any encroachment.

meanings.upright: Security, stability, control, and the strict protection of core habitat.
meanings.reversed: Restlessness, burnout, or a return to world before full recovery.

ecology.habitat_fragment: 受保護的森林洞穴/樹洞
ecology.risk_theme: 壓力導致的免疫力下降
ecology.mapping_note: Four of Pentacles represents 'Territorial Attachment'—a leopard cat refusing to leave its small core range even as surroundings are developed.
ecology.zh: 棲地樣貌：受保護的森林洞穴/樹洞 。 生存威脅：壓力導致的免疫力下降 。 牌義關聯：Four of Pentacles represents 'Territorial Attachment'—a leopard cat refusing to leave its small core range even as surroundings are developed. 。 石虎特徵：台灣石虎 。 生命階段：成年

website.excerpt: The FOUR OF PENTACLES reimagined as a story of survival and material prosperity for the Taiwan leopard cat.
website.seo_description: Security, stability, control, and the strict protection of core habitat.

meaning.zh: 安全感、穩定、控制欲，以及對核心棲地的嚴格守護。
meaning.en: Security, stability, control, and the strict protection of core habitat.
